/CAL: APD 1203,9PC  MOTION TO TRANSFER OUT PROBATION FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO SOLANO COUNTY/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO SOLANO COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/

/CAL:RESTITUTION DETERMINATION/DAWT/30    CAPD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/DEF:IS ORDERED TO REPORT TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNIT FOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION/RESTRPT:03-20-19/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DOPU:DEFENDANT STIPUALTES TO THE RESTITUTION & THE PD IS AUTHORIZED TO ACCEPT/

/AJW/DNACOMP/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 1Y/CTS:60/4019HALF/IND/WS/X:DEFENDANT SHALL COMPLY WITH CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER FILED 09-21-18,/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/RESTV/X:APD RESTITUTION DETERMINATION TO INCLUDE DISMISSED CHARGES PURSUANT TO HARVEY WAIVER,/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/PPRFCOMP/CONTD:APD RESTITUTION DETERMINATION/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING IS VACATED,/TEXT:DEFT ADV& PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:3/IBARRA/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/REMA/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER,/X: ANYRESTITUTION OR STAY AWAY ORDERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF SENTENCE IN COUNT 3,/SA1:JULIO C, IBARRA/SA2:INTERSECTION OF MISSION ST, AND PERSIA AVE,, S,F, CA/SAORD/PRES:10-15-18/PPRFCUST/ARBUCKLE/CONTD:PSR AND SENTENCE/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:SILAS GENESON/X:COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO CONTINUE THE PRELIMINARY HEARING,/STIPLD:09-25-18/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:09-10-18/987,2/BAIL:150,000/SAORD/SA1:JULIO IBARRA & CHAIYUT SINSOONGSUD/SA4:988 MARKET STREET, SF CA & INTERSECTION OF MISSION STREET & PERSIA STREET, SF CA/SAORD3/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE:4 HOURS/DOP
/CAL:APD RESTITUTION REPORT/CTORD:GENERAL ORDER FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION ASTO THE FOLLOWING VICTIMS:/X:UDOM SUACHAROEN & CHAIYUT SINSOONGSUD/CONTPRO
/CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAWT/TE:4 HOURS/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOPC/
